header.gameNote: College Football Playoff First Round Game

scoringPlays.text: John Mateer 8 Yd Run (Tate Sandell Kick)
Isaiah Sategna III 7 Yd pass from John Mateer (Tate Sandell Kick)
Lotzeir Brooks 10 Yd pass from Ty Simpson (Conor Talty Kick)
Zabien Brown 50 Yd Interception Return (Conor Talty Kick)
Lotzeir Brooks 30 Yd pass from Ty Simpson (Conor Talty Kick)
Deion Burks 37 Yd pass from John Mateer (Tate Sandell Kick)
Daniel Hill 6 Yd Run (Conor Talty Kick)

videos.headline: Alabama erases 17-point deficit, rallies past Oklahoma
videos.description: Alabama scores 27 unanswered points to stun Oklahoma and advance in the College Football Playoff.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama erases 17-point deficit, rallies past Oklahoma) 2025/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: No. 9 Alabama rallies to overwhelm No. 8 Oklahoma
videos.description: Down 17-0 in the second quarter, the Crimson Tide roar back for a 34-24 victory over the Sooners in Norman to advance in the College Football Playoff.

tracking.trackingName: SEC_NCF Highlight (Bama OU CFP HLT) 251219

videos.headline: John Mateer shakes and bakes his way to an Oklahoma TD
videos.description: John Mateer jukes past the defense on the opening touchdown for Oklahoma against Alabama.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (John Mateer shakes and bakes his way to an Oklahoma TD) 2025/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tate Sandell boots an impressive 51-yard field goal for Oklahoma
videos.description: Tate Sandell boots an impressive 51-yard field goal for Oklahoma

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tate Sandell boots an impressive 51-yard field goal for Oklahoma ) 2025/12/20 ESHEET

videos.headline: John Mateer finds a wide-open Isaiah Sategna III to pad Oklahoma's lead
videos.description: John Mateer finds a wide-open Isaiah Sategna III to pad Oklahoma's lead
